name: oathbound
description: Install verified Claude Code skills and agents from the Oath Bound registry
author: Josh Anderson

scripts.build: bun build cli.ts --outfile=dist/cli.cjs --target=node --format=cjs && node -e "const f='dist/cli.cjs';let s=require('fs').readFileSync(f,'utf8');s=s.replace('require.main == require.module','require.main === module');require('fs').writeFileSync(f,s)" && printf '%s\n' '#!/usr/bin/env node' | cat - dist/cli.cjs > dist/tmp && mv dist/tmp dist/cli.cjs
